entity_name: Passive Income via Boring Utility Sites (Transcript)
summary: A transcript of a video explaining how 'boring' utility websites (e.g., word unscramblers, sleep calculators, IP address checkers) generate massive passive income (up to $825k/month) through high-volume, low-competition traffic monetized via Google AdSense. The creator cloned a profitable unscrambler site in 15 minutes using AI without writing code.

processes.name: Utility Site Creation & Monetization
pain_points: People mistakenly think they need a big brand, products, or social media following to make money online.
processes.proposed_changes: Focus on building simple, single-purpose utility tools that solve immediate user problems and rank for evergreen search terms, then monetize with display ads.
